title: spartina stricta var. glabra
intro: Spartina stricta var. glabra, also known as smooth cordgrass, is a variety of Spartina stricta, a type of salt-tolerant grass native to the eastern coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Spartina stricta var. glabra include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
